segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I've been having trouble concentrating when I study. Do you have any advice? Have you tried taking short breaks throughout the day? That can help refresh your mind. I usually just keep working until I'm finished with the assignment. Maybe I should try that. Also make sure you're staying hydrated and getting enough sleep. Both can greatly affect your concentration. I'll keep a full pitcher of water at my desk at all times.
